name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: ProfessionalPlayer
entity_types.description: Professional esports player competing in leagues like LCK, can interact on social media.

attributes.name: player_name
attributes.description: Full name or in-game name of the player

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: In-game role such as top, jungle, mid, ADC, support

entity_types.name: Coach
entity_types.description: Head coach or assistant coach of an esports team, responsible for strategy and training.

attributes.name: coach_name
attributes.description: Full name of the coach

attributes.name: team_affiliation
attributes.description: Current team they are coaching

entity_types.name: EsportsTeam
entity_types.description: Professional esports organization competing in leagues, with official social media accounts.

attributes.name: team_name
attributes.description: Official name of the esports team

attributes.name: league
attributes.description: League they compete in, e.g., LCK

entity_types.name: LeagueOrganization
entity_types.description: Organization that operates esports leagues, such as LCK, with official presence.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the league organization

attributes.name: region
attributes.description: Geographic region it operates in, e.g., Korea

entity_types.name: Analyst
entity_types.description: Esports analyst or commentator who provides insights and predictions on social media.

attributes.name: analyst_name
attributes.description: Full name or handle of the analyst

attributes.name: specialization
attributes.description: Area of expertise, e.g., LCK, team performance

examples: Professional esports analyst mentioned in the text

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News or media organization that reports on esports events and teams.

attributes.name: outlet_name
attributes.description: Name of the media outlet

attributes.name: coverage_focus
attributes.description: Primary focus of coverage, e.g., esports, gaming

entity_types.name: FanGroup
entity_types.description: Organized group of fans supporting a specific team or player, active on social media.

attributes.name: group_name
attributes.description: Name of the fan group or community

attributes.name: supported_entity
attributes.description: Team or player they support

entity_types.name: Sponsor
entity_types.description: Company or brand that sponsors esports teams or events, with official accounts.

attributes.name: sponsor_name
attributes.description: Name of the sponsoring company

attributes.name: industry
attributes.description: Industry of the sponsor, e.g., insurance, tech

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual not covered by more specific types, such as casual fans or general public.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name of the person

attributes.name: role_description
attributes.description: Brief description of their role or identity

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organization not covered by more specific types, such as small groups or associations.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the organization

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: General purpose or activity of the organization

edge_types.name: PLAYS_FOR
edge_types.description: Player is a member of an esports team.

edge_types.name: COACHES
edge_types.description: Coach leads or trains an esports team.

edge_types.name: COMPETES_IN
edge_types.description: Esports team participates in a league organized by a league organization.

edge_types.name: ANALYZES
edge_types.description: Analyst provides analysis or commentary on teams, players, or leagues.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media outlet publishes news or reports about esports entities.

edge_types.name: SUPPORTS
edge_types.description: Fan group or sponsor expresses support for a team or player.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Any entity posts comments or opinions about another entity on social media.

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Entity replies to or engages with another entity's post or statement.

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于英雄联盟LCK联赛中HLE战队的表现分析，涉及选手、教练、战队、联赛组织、分析师、媒体、粉丝和赞助商等实体。根据社交媒体舆论模拟需求，设计了8个具体实体类型（如职业选手、教练、电竞战队等）和2个兜底类型（Person和Organization），确保所有实体都是现实中可发声的主体。关系类型（6-10个）覆盖了社媒互动中的常见联系，如隶属、分析、报道、支持等，以模拟舆论传播路径。
simulation_requirement:
1,857
您是一位专注于英雄联盟LCK联赛的专业电竞分析师。

您的任务是预测韩华生命电竞（HLE）在2026赛季LCK联赛中的表现。
